text.title: Ads Analytics Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: implement Consent Mode v2 first; GDPR audit exposure unbounded otherwise
write event-spec doc before any code; freeze before implementation

branch.when: site_lifespan_days >= 90 AND consent_mode == 'present' AND event_spec == 'present' AND bq_link == false

conclusion.verdict: link BigQuery before launch; raw-event window starts at link, not at property-create

branch.when: site_lifespan_days >= 90 AND consent_mode == 'present' AND event_spec == 'present' AND bq_link == true

conclusion.verdict: wire UTM standard + DebugView verification + ad-platform integrations

example.trace: site_lifespan_days >= 90 AND consent_mode == 'present' AND event_spec == 'present' AND bq_link == true → conclusion ref="verification-before-go-live" verdict="wire UTM standard + DebugView verification + ad-platform integrations"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
